summary: Gate N reviewed the generated L1 prototype evidence and passed. The pipeline produced a visible local prototype, validated it over localhost with HTTP 200, recorded artifact digests, and kept real providers, external repos, deploys, PRs, Web, IDE, auth, payments, and multitenancy out of scope.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to the API provider activation proposal. That next step should define credentials, cost ceilings, raw+parsed evidence, and drift controls before any paid provider call is allowed.
notes: Gate N proves a runnable prototype artifact, not only a plan.
Next task is proposal-only for API provider activation.
